activity_summary: A support operations manager reviews refund escalation cases and decides approve, policy review, or missing evidence.

verification_checklist: Run npm test
Run npm run capture:model-ui:screenshots
feature render paths must not emit raw input, select, textarea, or checkbox markup outside approved helpers
new primitives or variants require updating the repo-local contract first
generated UI must include a local check command or equivalent static inspection
gpt55-xhigh-codex-with-judgmentkit desktop screenshot has a styled primary work surface
gpt55-xhigh-codex-with-judgmentkit mobile screenshot keeps the decision and handoff visible
desktop viewport screenshot
mobile viewport screenshot
keyboard focus check for interactive controls
overflow check for long labels, descriptions, and values
modal or dialog footer order check when dialogs are present
disabled, empty, error, and ready state review
Verify state: selected work item is visible
Verify state: decision evidence is scannable
Verify state: primary action and handoff reason are clear
Verify required state: empty
Verify required state: ready
Verify required state: loading
Verify required state: error
Verify required state: disabled
Verify required state: focus-visible

command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static operator-review UI for choosing a refund escalation path and sending a clear handoff.
parsed.css: *{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:#f6f7f8;color:#17212b;font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif;line-height:1.45}.refund-review{min-height:100vh;padding:24px;display:grid;grid-template-rows:auto 1fr;gap:18px}.surface-header{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;padding:18px 20px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #d9dee5;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(23,33,43,.05)}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 4px;color:#5b6673;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em}.surface-header h1{margin:0;font-size:26px;line-height:1.2;letter-spacing:0}.surface-subtitle{margin:6px 0 0;color:#4b5563;max-width:720px}.header-metrics{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end}.metric{min-width:104px;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #d9dee5;border-radius:8px;background:#fbfcfd}.metric strong{display:block;font-size:20px}.metric span{display:block;color:#5b6673;font-size:12px}.review-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(260px,320px) minmax(0,1fr) minmax(308px,380px);gap:16px;align-items:start}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #d9dee5;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(23,33,43,.04)}.panel-header{padding:16px 16px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid #e7eaee}.panel-header h2,.section h2{margin:0;font-size:16px;line-height:1.25}.hint{margin:4px 0 0;color:#66717e;font-size:13px}.queue-list{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:8px}.queue-item{width:100%;text-align:left;border:1px solid transparent;background:transparent;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;display:grid;gap:7px;color:inherit;cursor:pointer;min-height:76px}.queue-item:hover{background:#f3f7f5}.queue-item.is-selected{background:#eef8f1;border-color:#69a97a;box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #278442}.queue-top,.queue-bottom,.detail-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px}.case-id{font-weight:800;color:#25313d}.amount{font-weight:800}.customer{font-weight:700}.state{font-size:12px;border-radius:999px;padding:3px 8px;background:#eef1f4;color:#3e4853;white-space:nowrap}.state.need{background:#fff2dd;color:#8b4b00}.state.policy{background:#eaf0ff;color:#2c57a5}.state.ready{background:#e8f6ee;color:#22683b}.queue-empty{margin:6px 12px 14px;padding:12px;border:1px dashed #cfd6de;border-radius:8px;color:#606b77;background:#fbfcfd;font-size:13px}.workspace{display:grid;gap:16px}.section{padding:18px}.summary-card{display:grid;gap:14px}.status-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start}.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 9px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;white-space:nowrap}.badge.warning{background:#fff2dd;color:#8b4b00}.badge.success{background:#e8f6ee;color:#22683b}.badge.info{background:#eaf0ff;color:#2c57a5}.badge.neutral{background:#eef1f4;color:#44505c}.request-copy{margin:0;color:#25313d;font-size:15px}.detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px}.detail-box{border:1px solid #e1e5ea;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;background:#fbfcfd}.detail-box span{display:block;color:#66717e;font-size:12px}.detail-box strong{display:block;margin-top:2px;font-size:14px;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.evidence-list{list-style:none;margin:14px 0 0;padding:0;display:grid;gap:10px}.evidence-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:10px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #e1e5ea;border-radius:8px;background:#fbfcfd}.evidence-mark{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;background:#e8f6ee;color:#22683b;flex:none}.evidence-item.missing{border-color:#f1be73;background:#fffaf2}.evidence-item.missing .evidence-mark{background:#fff2dd;color:#8b4b00}.evidence-item strong{display:block;margin-bottom:2px}.evidence-item p{margin:0;color:#52606d;font-size:14px}.empty-note{margin-top:8px;color:#8b4b00;font-weight:700}.policy-box{display:grid;gap:12px}.policy-box p{margin:0;color:#34404c}.callout{border-left:4px solid #2f6fbd;background:#f1f6ff;border-radius:6px;padding:12px;color:#26394f}.decision-panel{position:sticky;top:24px;display:grid;gap:14px;padding:16px}.decision-group,.owner-group{display:grid;gap:8px}.decision-button,.owner-button,.primary-action,.secondary-action{min-height:42px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #cbd3dc;background:#fff;color:#18232e;font-weight:800;padding:10px 12px;text-align:left;cursor:pointer}.decision-button:hover,.owner-button:hover,.secondary-action:hover{background:#f3f7f5}.decision-button.is-selected,.owner-button.is-selected{border-color:#278442;background:#eef8f1;color:#18572d;box-shadow:inset 3px 0 0 #278442}.decision-button:disabled{background:#eef1f4;color:#7b8490;border-color:#d5dbe2;cursor:not-allowed}.reason-message{margin:2px 0 8px;font-size:13px;color:#5d6874}.reason-message.is-error{color:#a74400;font-weight:700}.owner-group{grid-template-columns:1fr}.handoff-card{border:1px solid #d9dee5;border-radius:8px;background:#fbfcfd;padding:14px;display:grid;gap:10px}.handoff-line{margin:0}.handoff-line span{display:block;color:#66717e;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.handoff-line strong{display:block;margin-top:2px;color:#202b36}.handoff-reason{margin:0;color:#34404c;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e1e5ea;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.action-row{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center}.primary-action{background:#278442;color:#fff;border-color:#278442;text-align:center}.primary-action:hover{background:#1f7338}.secondary-action{text-align:center;color:#34404c}.status-stack{display:grid;gap:8px;margin-top:2px}.state-line{border-radius:8px;padding:9px 10px;font-size:13px;background:#fbfcfd;border:1px solid #e1e5ea;color:#52606d}.state-line.is-ready{border-color:#b8dfc4;background:#f0fbf4;color:#236b3d}.state-line.is-loading{border-color:#c8d8f4;background:#f5f8ff;color:#315f9f}.state-line.is-error{border-color:#f0c58c;background:#fff8ef;color:#8b4b00}.panel button:focus-visible,.primary-action:focus-visible,.secondary-action:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #8cc2ff;outline-offset:2px}@media (max-width:1050px){.review-grid{grid-template-columns:280px minmax(0,1fr)}.decision-panel{position:static;grid-column:1/-1;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));align-items:start}.decision-panel .section-title{grid-column:1/-1}.action-row{grid-column:1/-1}}@media (max-width:760px){.refund-review{padding:14px}.surface-header{display:grid}.header-metrics{justify-content:start}.review-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.review-grid>.panel[aria-label="Refund queue"]{order:1}.decision-panel{order:2;grid-template-columns:1fr}.workspace{order:3}.detail-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.status-row,.queue-top,.queue-bottom{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column}.action-row{flex-direction:column}.primary-action,.secondary-action{width:100%;text-align:center}.surface-header h1{font-size:22px}}
parsed.html:
Support operations

Refund escalation review

Review the selected refund request, confirm the evidence, choose the next path, and send the handoff with a clear reason.

3open cases
1needs evidence
$585.95under review

Refund queue

Select request

No older refund escalations are waiting in this view.

Selected request

Nora Diaz · Pro annual · R-1842

Evidence incomplete

Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

Refund amount$184.20
PlanPro annual
Current ownerSupport operations manager
Recommended next ownerSupport agent
Ready: selected request is available for manager review.
Checking new attachments before the handoff is sent.

Evidence checklist

Confirm what supports the decision and what blocks approval.

  • OK
    Renewal date confirmed

    Purchase history shows the renewal date inside the exception window.

  • OK
    Customer reason captured

    Support note records the disputed renewal and refund reason.

  • !
    Receipt photo missing

    Manager approval needs proof attached to the request.

    No receipt attached.

Policy context

Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete.

Unclear duplicate-charge cases should go to policy review.

Current fit: Return for evidence because the receipt photo is missing before approval.

Decision path

Choose the path that matches the evidence.

Receipt photo is missing, so approval is not available yet.

Choose next owner

Route the handoff to the person who can unblock the case.

Handoff reason

Next actionReturn the request to the support agent

Receipt photo is missing. Ask the customer to attach proof before approval.

Next ownerSupport agent
